name: Oatmeal Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 quart low fat buttermilk (or skim milk soured with 1 tablespoon lemon juice per cup)
Egg substitute to equal four eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the oatmeal, low fat buttermilk (or sourdough milk), flour, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl until well mixed.
2. Stir in the egg substitute until fully incorporated.
3. The batter will be thin; if desired, lightly spray a hot griddle or skillet with cooking oil.
4. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter per pancake onto the heated surface.
5. Cook until golden brown on each side, approximately 2-3 minutes per side.
